import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    """Test that items exactly filling capacity are included."""
    # Capacity=3, item (3, 10) exactly fills the knapsack
    # Buggy code uses weight < j, so when weight=3 and j=3, item is excluded
    # Correct code should use weight <= j and return 10
    assert source.knapsack(3, [(3, 10), (1, 5)]) == 10
